commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is required because the PR is draft/protected and the remaining blockers are security-boundary, public API/config, release, and proof decisions rather than a narrow mechanical repair.; Needs attention: No supply-chain dependency injection was found in the inspected diff, but the PR intentionally changes the host-exec security boundary and needs maintainer approval before merge. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds normalized `tools.exec.mode` and exec reviewer config, wires native/Codex auto-review approval paths, exports exec-approval helpers through the Plugin SDK, updates Gateway approval params, docs, generated baselines, package metadata, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The relevant verification question is release confidence for the new exec approval mode, and the PR body reports focused tests but no live Guardian end-to-end run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is required because the PR is draft/protected and the remaining blockers are security-boundary, public API/config, release, and proof decisions rather than a narrow mechanical repair.
